description:
Evaluate the longitudinal static stability of the eCRM-001 model at an aft CG position. Open the eCRM-001 model located at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3. Navigate to Analysis > VSPAero. In the Reference tab, set the Reference Xcg to 28.5 m (leave other reference values default). Set up a VLM Alpha sweep for 0.0, 2.0, and 4.0 degrees at Mach 0.2. Execute the VSPAero solver. Locate the generated .polar output file and find the Pitching Moment Coefficient (CMy) at Alpha=0 and Alpha=4. Calculate the pitching moment derivative using the formula: Cm_alpha = (CMy_4 - CMy_0) / 4. Determine if the aircraft is Stable (Cm_alpha < 0) or Unstable (Cm_alpha > 0). Write a report to /home/ga/Desktop/stability_report.txt strictly following this format:

Longitudinal Stability Assessment
=================================
Aircraft       : eCRM-001
CG X-Position  : 28.5 m
CMy at Alpha=0 : [Your Value]
CMy at Alpha=4 : [Your Value]
Cm_alpha       : [Your Value] per deg
Status         : [Stable or Unstable]

Finally, save the configured model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_stability.vsp3.
